registrationId.description: Id of the legal entity in his country of registration

registrationLocation.description: Country of registration of the legal entity

registeredSiteRegistrationId.description: Id of the legal entity's registered site in his country of registration

registeredSiteLocation.description: Country of registration of the legal entity's registered site

externalIds.description: Unique reference to external Ids coming from integration tools or external data base

title.description: Title (or name) of the legal entity

registeredSiteTitle.description: Title (or name) of the legal entity's registered site

description.description: Small description of the legal entity

registrationEntity.description: Registration entity that gave the legal entity registration definition

otherIds.description: Other relevant Ids not part of a legal entity registration

legalStatus.description: Legal status registered in the registration entity (Active or Inactive)

legalForm.description: Legal form from the legal entity registration definition

latitude.description: Latitude GPS coordinate of the registration adresse

longitude.description: Longitude GPS coordinate of the registration adresse

skip.name: skip
skip.description: Skip a number of result equal to the parameter.

top.name: top
top.description: Number of returned results. Must be an integer between 1 and 50 included.

include.name: include
include.description: Attribute selector. Only support 'info' value for the moment

If-Match.name: If-Match
If-Match.description: The value should be the resource latest eTag. If not provided or not the latest one will result in error

If-None-Match.name: If-None-Match
If-None-Match.description: The value should be an eTag ID. If matching it will not return a result, else it will revert back to default behavior

title.name: title
title.description: Search string over entities Title. Regex not supported

externalSource.name: externalSource
externalSource.description: Source attribute of an external Id. Need to be provided alongside externalIdentifier

externalIdentifier.name: externalIdentifier
externalIdentifier.description: identifier attribute of an external Id. Need to be provided alongside externalSource

externalIds.description: Unique reference to external Ids coming from integration tools or external data base

op.description: Operation applied on the sub-resource, support add, remove. Modify is the default behavior if nothing is given

201_entities.description: CREATED. The request is valid and the requested Entities created.

201_relationship.description: CREATED. The request is valid and the requested Relationships created.

201_supplier_user.description: CREATED. The request is valid and the requested Supplier Users created.

email.description: Supplier Users email used for invitation

state.description: Life cycle of the suplier user

disciplines.description: Allocated disciplines to the supplier user

200_entities_update.description: SUCCESS. The request is valid and the requested Entities updated.

200_relationship_update.description: SUCCESS. The request is valid and the requested Relationship updated.

200_supplier_user_update.description: SUCCESS. The request is valid and the requested Supplier Users updated.

207_entities.description: MULTI STATUS. The request contains error(s), some Entities haven't been created

type.description: Error Type : unique identifier of error type

title.example: Your request is malformed. Review the API documentation to ensure your request contains required formatting.

207_relationship.description: MULTI STATUS. The request contains error(s), some Relationship haven't been created

type.description: Error Type : unique identifier of error type

title.example: Your request is malformed. Review the API documentation to ensure your request contains required formatting.

207_supplier_user.description: MULTI STATUS. The request contains error(s), some Supplier Users haven't been created

email.description: Supplier Users email used for invitation

disciplines.description: Allocated disciplines to the supplier user

type.description: Error Type : unique identifier of error type

title.example: Your request is malformed. Review the API documentation to ensure your request contains required formatting.

304.description: NOT MODIFIED. The data you requested has not been modified since your last GET

400.description: BAD REQUEST. The request could not be understood by the server due to malformed syntax. The client SHOULD NOT repeat the request without modifications.

type.description: Error Type : unique identifier of error type

title.example: Your request is malformed. Review the API documentation to ensure your request contains required formatting.

401.description: UNAUTHORIZED. The request requires user authentication.

404.description: NOT FOUND. Requested resources was not found.

type.description: Error Type : unique identifier of error type

title.example: Check that the resource exists and that you have correct access privileges.

412.description: The precondition specified in the header request has failed. Mostly thrown by If-Match header

type.description: Error Type : unique identifier of error type

title.example: The precondition specified in the header request has failed.
